heading: Commands
body:
Not all commands are supported on all tiers, and Atlas supports some
commands only on Free clusters and Flex clusters.

- Some commands have [limits or are unsupported](free-tier-command-limitations)
  on Free clusters and Flex clusters. To learn more about these unsupported commands, refer to
  [Unsupported Commands in Atlas](unsupported-commands).

- Some commands have [limits on M10+ clusters](limited-commands-paid),
  or are [unsupported on M10+ clusters](unsupported-commands-paid). To
  learn more about these commands, refer to [Commands Available in Flex and Free clusters](free-tier-commands).
